titleStmt.title: SII 19.380: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 380. (A.R. No. 488 of 1925.) ON THE WEST AND SOUTH BASES OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This is evidently a supplement to the record No. 379 above, and gives a detailed schedule of the several items of requirements of worship, sacred bath, lamps and feeding in the temple, with their individual value in paddy, which was provided by the endowment registered in that record.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu tenkaraiy Aḷaṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam cempiyanmahādevicaturvedimaṅkalattu śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyamahādevarkku tiṅkaḷ saṅkrāntitoṟum snapanañ ceytaruḷuvataṟku muttanampirāṭṭiyār Uṟaṭṭaiyan coḻappaiyārāṉa tribhuvanamahādevi
vaytta nipantappaṭi tiṭṭiyatu Ativāsaṉaikku pālikaikku kiḻaṭṭa ḷa3� muḷaiyaṭṭapayaṟuṅkaṭukum Eḷḷum mutalāka veṇṭuvaṉa Ellāttukkum teṉ kūvukka+teṉ 2payāka Akka+ ḷa6 Āka ḷa6 ney 2pa yakku ḷā Āka ney 6kku ḷa6�m yāka pāl 2pa kku ḷayāka pāl 6kku ḷa kū tayi
�rkku ḷaṣayāka tayir 6kku ḷa�t kaṭuku �ḷavasa yāka kaṭuku �kku ḷāṅa Eḷḷu sakkuḷa�yāka Eḷḷu �kkuḷa2ṅa mañcaḷ poṭikku A kku ḷaṅaṅa vāḻaiypaḻamum pilāppaḻamum māmpaḻamum kiḷikaḷeñcippaḻamum nārattampaḻamum mātaḷaṅkāyum maṟṟum palaṅkaḷu
kkumāka ḷa2�snamanadravyattukku Akka+ ḷa6 pori �kku ḷa6 taruppaṇam ḷa� kalacakkayirm Ativāsaṉaikku pālikaiyum peruntiruvamutukku veṇṭum kalacamum Iṭuṅkucava ṉukku ḷavu kalacattiṉkiḻaṭṭa Arici 3ṅainma2pa kalacattiṉkiḻaṭṭa Eḷḷu ṅakku ḷa
3 kalaccu cuṟṟum ṉūl ttukku Akkam vakku ḷa3 jalapavitram vaṭikka puṭavai 1 pradhāna- kalacam cuṟṟa puṭavaiy 2āka puṭavai 3 Akka3nya ntanam Uriyk kuḻampukku cantanam 5 palattukku ḷaṅa� Aṟṟaiyṉāḷāl paḷḷittāmamiṭuvāṉ+ ḷaṅam peruntiruvamutukku Arici 3 ceṉṉelāl
Añciraṇṭuvaṇṇamāka 3ṅa neyyamitu viḷaṅa mirtu kūkku ḷaṅa paruppamutu �kku ḷa3patayiramirtu sakku ḷākū palakāyam Iruccer paṭimāyiṉāl ḷa3 carkkaraiy+palattuk kum vāḻaippaḻam [2 10]kkum Āka ḷa�savi viṟakiṭuvāṉukku ḷaṅa6�citāricantanamum Akilum neriyā
samum kaṟpūramum teva ḷa �ṇyā[ha]varicikku brāhmaṇarkku porilaiy peṟuṅ kā 5 10ḷa3 10 6 viḷakku 4 10kku Eṇṇai 2ḷavū niṟmāniyam poka Aṭṭuvāṉukku ḷanya darbhaimālaikku pullaṟukkavum Aṭṭuvāṉukkum ḷa� toraṇañceyyum taccaṉukku ḷa�m
ñcaḷpoṭi yiṭippāḷukku maval maṭṭavumāka ḷaṅa tirumeḻukkiṭuvāṉukku ḷa� Uttaramaya namum dakṣaṇamayanamumāka saṅkrān=ti [ 2- ṇṭu] kku paricaṭṭakaṇaikku kācu+ṉāl ḷadhisa Uttaramayanasaṅkrān=tiṉāḷ Uṇṇum brāhmaṇar 100m dakṣiṇamayanasaṅkrān=tiṉāṉṟu Uṇ ṇum brāhmaṇar 100m Āka brāhmaṇar 2 100- varkkum perāl ḷa3 yāka
brāhmaṇar 2 100- varkku ḷa2�vū tirunondāviḷakku 1 Uḻakku cella nicca ḷa3 yāka Orāṭṭaiṉāḷaikkuḷa3�m Āka saṅkrānti ḷadhakkā� Āka saṅkrān=ti(2) 2ṉāl brāhma- ṇar 2 100varkkum ḷadhana6 Āka saṅkrān=ti 2ṇṭukkum niṭṭam 1 viḷakku 6co[ kikku] ḷā0�m tirunontāviḷakku+kku Orāṭṭaiynāḷaikku ḷa3 100m Āka ḷa2 100 5 10 6 10 3paitu candrādityavaṟ niṟkkac ceytatu .
Digital edition of SII 19.380 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
